required_fields.name: contract_version
required_fields.description: Version for the registry-backed rescue contract shape.

required_fields.name: disease
required_fields.description: Disease area covered by the rescue task.

required_fields.name: entity_type
required_fields.description: Entity type covered by the rescue task.

required_fields.name: summary
required_fields.description: Short summary of the rescue task.

required_fields.name: contract_scope
required_fields.description: Whether the contract stays rescue-only or documents an intentional benchmark bridge.

required_fields.name: artifact_contracts
required_fields.description: Explicit future artifact interfaces and leakage rules for the rescue task.

optional_fields.name: benchmark_task_bridge_id
optional_fields.description: Optional benchmark task identifier when a bridge is intentionally documented.
